ValidationRule.description: Only Campaign Administration staff can edit a Nomination if the Status is 'Denied'.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "Z"),
NOT(ISNEW()),
NOT(OR(
$Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $Permission.Edit_Campaign_Event_Nomination_Status, $User.ND_Bypass_Duplicate_Rules__c = TRUE)
)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Campaign Administration staff can edit a Nomination if the Status is 'Denied'.
